$doc: ADVISORY render of core/policy/policy-data.json for Codex. These are NOT enforced permission rules and must NOT be pasted into Codex config as Claude-style permissions.allow/deny strings. Codex's real command guarding is the PreToolUse bash-guard hook + sandbox; there is no declarative secret-READ deny surface, so the secretReadPatterns below are guidance for the model, NOT an enforced block. If a future Codex version exposes a compatible exec-policy surface, translate the fixed-subcommand patterns there. This file is reference (not deployed as an enforced fragment).
enforcement: ADVISORY — commands: hook+sandbox enforced for the catastrophic-rm class only; secret-reads: NOT pattern-enforced (model guidance).
